summary: GPS Admin Portal - Complete testing of backend APIs and frontend UI. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend E2E tests passed for login, dashboard, companies, devices, map, and logout flows.
critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about HTML nesting (span inside tbody/select) - these are from React dev tools injection and don't affect functionality
seed_data_creation: Test companies and devices created during testing were cleaned up. 3 existing devices in database with positions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: GPS Admin Portal fully functional. Backend APIs: auth/login, auth/me, stats, companies CRUD, devices CRUD, assign/unassign, positions all working. Frontend: Login redirects to dashboard, sidebar navigation works (Dashboard, Appareils, Societes, Carte globale), companies and devices CRUD forms work, map loads with light CartoDB tiles and sidebar panel. Light theme (white backgrounds, emerald green accents) correctly implemented.

frontend_flows: GPS Admin Login: Navigate to /gps-admin/login, enter credentials, redirect to dashboard ✓
GPS Admin Dashboard: Stats cards (Appareils, Assignes, Non assignes, En ligne, Hors ligne, Societes) ✓
GPS Admin Sidebar Navigation: 4 items (Dashboard, Appareils, Societes, Carte globale) ✓
GPS Admin Companies Page: Add company form works ✓
GPS Admin Devices Page: Table with columns (IMEI, Vehicule, Plaque, Chauffeur, Societe, Position, Actions) ✓
GPS Admin Add Device: Form works, device created ✓
GPS Admin Map Page: Leaflet map with light tiles (CartoDB light_all), sidebar panel visible ✓
GPS Admin Logout: Deconnexion button redirects to login ✓
